subject: Sandile, a small crocodilian Pokemon with a dark body and black goggle-like eye markings, posed low to the ground
description: A small crocodile-like Pokemon crouches against a warm sandy-golden sparkle background. The creature has a dark upper body with a lighter pink-tan underbelly and distinctive black oval markings around its eyes that resemble goggles or sunglasses. Its posture is low and compact. The background has a bright holo-sparkle texture suggesting sand or sun glare. The overall palette is warm and earthy.
